summary: Phase 4 testing of CitSpray OMS completed successfully. Backend tests: 18/18 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all 5 new changes: print auth via query param, delete order with 2 confirmations, All Orders page with payment filter, role-based visibility, and custom date range options.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog accessibility warnings for missing Description - not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test_tc_phase4 telecaller user, Test Customer Phase4, and order CS-0001 with partial payment status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working: 1) Print endpoint now uses token query param (/api/orders/{id}/print?token=JWT) - works correctly, returns 401 without token. 2) Delete order permanently removes order (DELETE /api/orders/{id}) with 2 confirmation dialogs in UI. 3) All Orders page (/all-orders) shows payment status filter (Fully Paid, Partial, Unpaid) and is accessible to all roles via sidebar. 4) Admin sees Executive column on All Orders, telecaller/dispatch do NOT. 5) Telecaller/dispatch viewing All Orders cannot see formulations (stripped by backend). 6) Dashboard shows 'Recent Orders' (first 10), not all orders. 7) Executive Reports tab has Custom Range option with Start Date and End Date fields. 8) Telecaller sales dashboard has Custom Range option with date inputs.
passed_tests: Admin login (admin/admin123)
Admin dashboard shows 'Recent Orders' tab (not all orders)
Admin dashboard has 'View All Orders' link button
Sidebar has 'All Orders' link for all roles
All Orders page (/all-orders) loads successfully
All Orders page has payment status filter (Fully Paid, Partial, Unpaid)
All Orders page has order status filter
Admin sees Executive column on All Orders
Telecaller does NOT see Executive column on All Orders
Print endpoint with token returns PDF (200 OK)
Print endpoint WITHOUT token returns 401
Print endpoint with empty token returns 401
Print endpoint with invalid token returns 401
Delete order API permanently removes order
Delete requires authentication
Admin can delete any order
Telecaller can delete their own orders
Order detail page shows Delete button (not Cancel)
Delete has 2 confirmation dialogs
First dialog: 'Yes, Delete'
Second dialog: 'Yes, Permanently Delete'
Executive Reports tab has 'Custom Range' period option
Custom Range shows Start Date and End Date inputs
Telecaller sales API supports date_from and date_to params
Telecaller dashboard has 'Custom Range' in sales period dropdown
Custom Range shows date inputs in telecaller dashboard
Telecaller/dispatch viewing All Orders - formulations stripped by backend
API: view_all=true strips telecaller_name for non-admin
API: view_all=true strips formulation for telecaller/dispatch roles
Payment status field present on all orders

mocked_apis.gst_verification: /api/gst-verify/{gst_no} - basic format check only, not live API
